$username..validate: newData.hasChildren(['username', 'fullName', 'answer', 'updatedAt']) && newData.child('username').isString() && newData.child('fullName').isString() && newData.child('updatedAt').isString() && (newData.child('answer').val() === 'Ja' || newData.child('answer').val() === 'Måske' || newData.child('answer').val() === 'Nej')
